title: U24 Spectral Operator: Verification Data and Analysis
description: Complete verification data, analysis notebooks, and reproducibility scripts for two companion papers: 'A Spectral Operator for the Riemann Hypothesis' (v14.0) and 'The Universality Constant: Eleven Paths to Omega = 24' (v1.3). Includes 20 data files across 8 subdirectories, 8 Jupyter notebooks, and figure-regeneration scripts. All analysis reproducible with standard scientific Python.
